_comment: DRAFT — pre-deploy safety hooks. The deploy footguns on this repo are real (worktree deploy, missing .env -> blank page). These hooks block obvious mistakes at the tool-call level. Paths assume Windows + git-bash; adjust if needed.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "firebase\\s+deploy"; then TOP=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); GITDIR=$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$GITDIR" ] && [ "$GITDIR" != ".git" ] && [ "$GITDIR" != "$TOP/.git" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: firebase deploy from a worktree. cd to the main repo dir first." >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ ! -s .env ] || ! grep -q "GEMINI_API_KEY=.\\+" .env; then echo "BLOCKED: .env is missing or GEMINI_API_KEY is empty. The app will white-screen in production without it." >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ ! -d dist ] || [ -z "$(ls -A dist 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: dist/ is empty. Run npm run build first." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'
